'''wasushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drafter|drafter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drafter|drafter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wasushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæsishith|wæsishith]] || [[word:wæsishij|wæsishij]] || [[word:wæsishish|wæsishish]] || [[word:wæsishi|wæsishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasusushuth|wasusushuth]] || [[word:wasusushuj|wasusushuj]] || [[word:wasusushush|wasusushush]] || [[word:wasusushu|wasusushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasushuth|wasushuth]] || [[word:wasushuj|wasushuj]] || [[word:wasushush|wasushush]] || [[word:wasushu|wasushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasufshuth|wasufshuth]] || [[word:wasufshuj|wasufshuj]] || [[word:wasufshush|wasufshush]] || [[word:wasufshuf|wasufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wasushuthu|wasushuthu]] || [[word:wasushuju|wasushuju]] || [[word:wasushushu|wasushushu]] || [[word:wasushuku|wasushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wasushuth|wasushuth]] || [[word:wasushuj|wasushuj]] || [[word:wasushush|wasushush]] || [[word:wasushu|wasushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wasushuthul|wasushuthul]] || [[word:wasushujul|wasushujul]] || [[word:wasushushul|wasushushul]] || [[word:wasushukul|wasushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wasushuthuthu|wasushuthuthu]] || [[word:wasushujuju|wasushujuju]] || [[word:wasushushushu|wasushushushu]] || [[word:wasushuku|wasushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wasushuthun|wasushuthun]] || [[word:wasushujun|wasushujun]] || [[word:wasushushun|wasushushun]] || [[word:wasushukun|wasushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wasushuthuoro|wasushuthuoro]] || [[word:wasushujuoro|wasushujuoro]] || [[word:wasushushuoro|wasushushuoro]] || [[word:wasushukuoro|wasushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
